category_sources: source_facts.description says egctl is a command-line utility for operating Envoy Gateway.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name identifies the project as egctl.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official Envoy Gateway site; /docs is its official documentation section.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description names Envoy Gateway; source_facts.repo points to envoyproxy/gateway; current_curation.tags marks it as CLI tooling.
